src/lib/playwright/recorder.ts.description: PlaywrightRecorder singleton pattern uses getRecorder() function. Updated to support repositoryId parameter - creates new instance when repositoryId changes (unless actively recording).

src/server/actions/recording.ts.description: Recording server actions now accept optional repositoryId parameter to enable repository-specific screenshot directories. Functions: startRecording, stopRecording, captureScreenshot, getRecordingStatus, clearLastCompletedSession.
